This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] getting audio.muted with muted="" (script-created)
  assert_true: expected true got false
[FAIL] setting audio.muted with muted="" (script-created)
  assert_equals: expected true but got false
[FAIL] adding/removing muted attribute dynamically affects audio.muted
  assert_true: expected true got false
[FAIL] getting video.muted with muted="" (script-created)
  assert_true: expected true got false
[FAIL] setting video.muted with muted="" (script-created)
  assert_equals: expected true but got false
[FAIL] adding/removing muted attribute dynamically affects video.muted
  assert_true: expected true got false
Harness: the test ran to completion.
